channel.title: Dotnettips.wordpress.com on .NET Ramblings
channel.description: Recent content in Dotnettips.wordpress.com on .NET Ramblings

item.title: General Performance: Comparing Methods for Retrieving Process File Path
item.description: The excerpt from "Rock Your Code" explains two methods for retrieving the initiating file's path in .NET. Link to article: https://dotnettips.wordpress.com/2026/03/29/general-performance-comparing-methods-for-retrieving-process-file-path/

item.title: General Performance: Exploring Thread ID Retrieval Methods
item.description: This article explains two methods to obtain the current thread ID in .NET and shows which method is more performant. Link to article: https://dotnettips.wordpress.com/2026/03/22/general-performance-exploring-thread-id-retrieval-methods/
